channel.title: Canonical URL facing Issue
channel.description:
Hello Friends,
I have created site in frontity but i can see API URL in canonical for SEO.
I need frontity site url in canonical.
So please help me for this.
Thanks

item.title: Canonical URL facing Issue
item.dc:creator: Johan
item.description:
If you use the Yoast Plugin and the package for it, the URLs will be modified for you.

When you use another SEO plugin it will depend on how you handle the headers yourself.

Read full topic

item.title: Canonical URL facing Issue
item.dc:creator: bhagvan.vrinsofts
item.description:
Hello Friends,

I have created site in frontity but i can see API URL in canonical for SEO.

I need frontity site url in canonical.

So please help me for this.

Thanks

Read full topic
